chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. D – 49 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on MA No.1059/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.1061/2024 (Antedating) 3. For hearing of main case 20.11.2024 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for the Applicants >>>>>..<<<<< 1&2., As per office note, the instant matter is already fixed on 24.12.2024, however, Counsel pleads urgency on the ground that he intends to withdraw from the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application and the applicants would file proper Constitutional Petition, for which necessary permission may be granted. Record supports his contention. Order accordingly. In view of above, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is hereby dismissed as not pressed. However, the applicants are at liberty to file afresh Constitutional Petition, if so advised. Judge Judge ARBROHI
